E-prescribing via Surescripts (Phase 4)

Once we wire up Surescripts integration, every Rx written here flows directly to the pharmacy network — no faxing, no manual entry. EPCS-certified for controlled substances. Full audit trail surfaces here. Until then, this dashboard reflects the existing EMR's prescribing data, surfaced and organized.
